title: False Alarm Discrimination Under Pressure
description: Multiple cameras trigger simultaneously. Most alerts are benign (maintenance worker on CAM-01, delivery on CAM-04). One real threat exists on CAM-02. Agent must investigate all, avoid false positives, identify the real threat, and escalate only the genuine incident.

frames.description: Parking lot. A worker in a reflective vest is checking vehicles with a clipboard. Normal maintenance rounds. No threat.
Building lobby. A delivery person is dropping off packages at the security desk. ID badge visible. Normal delivery activity.
Corridor. Empty. Lights functioning normally. No activity detected.
Warehouse. A person without safety gear is accessing the restricted chemical storage area. No ID badge visible. The area should be locked after hours.
Warehouse. The person is now handling chemical containers without protective equipment. Potential safety violation and security breach.
Parking lot. The maintenance worker from earlier has completed rounds and is walking back to the office building. Normal activity continues.
